data.title: Crypto Fear & Greed Index lingers in 'extreme fear', with Bitcoin consolidating above $60,000 support hinting at positivity.
data.description: The Crypto Fear and Greed Index continues to show extreme fear, with Bitcoin staying above the $60,000 support level during its prolonged consolidation phase. This suggests a potential positive outlook despite the current market sentiment.

data.title: ONWARD Medical Publishes Convocation of the 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders and Proposed Resolutions
data.description: Eindhoven, the Netherlands - April 01, 2026 - ONWARD Medical N.V., a renowned neurotechnology firm specializing in innovative therapies for individuals with spinal cord injuries and movement disabilities, has announced the commencement of its 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGM). The AGM is scheduled to take place in Amsterdam, the Netherlands, on May 13, 2026. ONWARD Medical N.V. is listed on Euronext with the ticker symbol ONWD and is also traded as an American Depositary Receipt (ADR) under the symbol ONWRY. This gathering will bring together stakeholders to discuss strategic initiatives and financial performance.

data.title: Google's Research On Quantum Threat 'Reasonable,' Crypto Community Should Start Preparing For Resistant Systems, Says Chamath Palihapitiya
data.description: Venture capitalist Chamath Palihapitiya has warned the cryptocurrency community about potential quantum threats to Bitcoin following Google's recent study indicating their closer proximity than previously believed. Palihapitiya expressed in a post that Google's findings raised important technical questions, emphasizing the need for preparation. He suggested that with the possibility of artificial general intelligence or superintelligent AI emerging soon, Bitcoin could be a prime target for hacking. Palihapitiya called for a focused effort within the crypto elders to make Bitcoin quantum-resistant within the next few years. He mentioned sharing similar concerns in the past, causing a stir among crypto enthusiasts due to their technical expertise and strong beliefs. Read more on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bitcoin's recent dip is calmer, suggesting growth. LVRG's Nick Ruck notes reduced volatility and trust from institutions.
data.description: According to Nick Ruck, director of LVRG Research, the current Bitcoin dip is not as deep as in previous cycles, suggesting a more mature market with lower volatility and increased institutional trust.

data.title: Dorsey envisions AI-driven workplaces after Block's 40% staff cut. Block reduced 4,000 jobs in Feb amid its shift to AI.
data.description: In February, Block made the decision to lay off 4,000 employees as it shifted its focus towards artificial intelligence. Jack Dorsey, from Block, recently shared insights on the future operations of the company and similar organizations.

data.title: Texas Lt. Gov. orders lawmakers to investigate crypto, prediction markets as other states face legal challenges.
data.description: The second-ranking official in the state of Texas has urged lawmakers to investigate the rapid rise of prediction market gambling. This comes amidst legal challenges faced by similar platforms in various jurisdictions.

data.description: In a recent announcement from Hilversum, The Netherlands on April 1, 2026, Universal Music Group N.V. (UMG) revealed the initiation of a share repurchase initiative. data.title: Ettifos Successfully Showcases Interoperable V2X Tolling with Audi and Kapsch
data.description: On March 26, 2026, in North Carolina, Ettifos, a top C-V2X solutions provider, successfully conducted real-world V2X tolling demonstrations. The collaboration with Audi and Kapsch TrafficCom confirmed the success of the demonstrations. This achievement marks a significant milestone in showcasing the effectiveness of V2X technology.

data.title: Invitation to media and analyst briefing for Ericsson Q1 2026 report
data.description: A financial report for the first quarter of 2026 by Ericsson (NASDAQ: ERIC) is set to be released at around 7:00 AM CEST on April 17, 2026. Additionally, a live video webcast will be available for analysts, investors, and journalists at 9:00 AM CEST on the same day. The report is highly anticipated and is expected to provide key insights into Ericsson's performance during this period. Keep an eye out for the detailed figures and analysis within the report for a comprehensive understanding of the company's financial status.

data.title: DentScribe Launches AI Treatment Coordinator Notes for Dental Practices
data.description: A cutting-edge workflow has been developed to transform post-appointment discussions with patients into organized financial records, actionable items, and valuable business intelligence. DentScribe, based in Sunnyvale, California, revealed this innovation on April 1, 2026. The AI-powered program, designed for dental record-keeping and efficiency, will revolutionize the way dental professionals handle patient interactions. This new system is set to significantly enhance productivity and streamline administrative tasks in the dental field.

data.title: Nike, RH And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Wednesday
data.description: U.S. stock futures are up today, with investors eyeing specific stocks. UniFirst Corp. (NYSE: UNF) is expected to announce earnings of $1.21 per share and revenue of $614.92 million before the market opens. UniFirst's stock closed at $251.59 on Tuesday, rising by 0.9%. On the other hand, RH (NYSE: RH) reported disappointing fourth-quarter results and predicted lower-than-expected sales for fiscal year 2026. The company foresees revenue between $3.58 billion and $3.72 billion for FY26. For more details, visit a financial news platform.
